records.summary: Governed entry point for Thiruppugazh, Kavasam works, Arunagirinathar literature, prayer records, reading formats and rights-aware audio status.
Unified, searchable gateway to verified devotional modules, directories, learning, personal browser-local tools and operational-quality records.
Transparent Phase D and E view of canonical routes, release-showcase pages, placeholders, duplicate-name candidates and unresolved-link remediation.
Collection-by-collection publication coverage for original Tamil, easy-reading Tamil, transliteration, meaning, audio rights and source verification.
Planned-versus-connected audit covering real files, governed routes, purpose-led hub visibility and production validation across the complete platform.
Provenance-labelled Murugan devotional illustrations, interface art and temple imagery with explicit documentary-photography boundaries.
Unified support, corrections, accessibility, privacy, terms, source policy and app guidance.
Verified PWA installation and a governed evidence boundary for future native application and package links.
Mission, Tamil-first architecture, source governance, privacy principles and independence boundary.
Browser-local structured correction template with page, evidence and rights fields and no automatic submission.
Privacy-preserving browser diagnostics, cache recovery, offline guidance and route troubleshooting.
Truthful answers about content completeness, source status, image labels, audio rights, local search and offline use.
Platform-use, source-status, content-rights, local-data, external-link and availability boundaries.

limitations: An addition is appended only when its path is not already present in the historical route registry.
Route existence does not imply complete devotional text, verified translation or recording rights.
No historical route record is deleted or overwritten by this file.
